pageContext.name: Predator Nendoroid
pageContext.description: 'You're one ugly mother****er!'  From 'Predator' comes a Nendoroid of the Predator. The Nendoroid is fully articulated, allowing you to create a variety of action-packed poses from the film. Both a masked faceplate and a terrifying unmasked faceplate are included.  The Predator's Wristblade, a Plasmacaster effect part, his Self-Destruct Device, and a spine + skull part are all included as optional parts. Enjoy mixing and matching optional parts to create all kinds of situations in Nendoroid form!  Predator fans don't miss your chance to add this Nendoroid figure to your collection today!
